prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild dormitory, Haru Oakspire, a masculine scout in a cropped travel jacket and messenger straps, stands beside Haru Starling, an androgynous mage in layered blue robes. Haru Oakspire points toward a shimmering, ethereal mana flicker hovering in the air, his expression alert and observant. The room is dimly lit with warm ambient light, cinematic camera, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot, Haru Starling leans forward and extends a hand toward the mana flicker, causing small glowing spell tags to orbit the energy as Haru Oakspire steadies his brass compass to track the source. The movement is fluid and cooperative, maintaining consistent character appearance and room lighting, no text, no watermark.
